summary: Copy Update Iteration 444 Testing Complete - All high-conversion copy changes verified. Landing page hero shows correct CTA 'Create Your First Video — Free', secondary button 'Watch Examples', trust line 'No credit card required • Takes 30 seconds • Free to start'. Showcase title 'See what people are creating'. Final CTA heading 'Create your first AI video now'. Footer CTA strip 'Create your first AI video in seconds — free' with 'Start Creating' button. Footer has 4 columns (Create, Discover, Company, Legal) with contact emails. Share page subtitle 'Made in seconds using AI', CTA text includes 'No editing needed. Free to start. Takes 30 seconds.', bottom CTA heading 'Don't just watch — create your own'. All regression tests passed: social proof banner, remix button, value props, more videos section, My Space 3 sections with controls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Copy update iteration 444 fully tested. Landing page uses A/B hero variants (A/B/C) - tested variant A which shows 'Create viral AI videos in seconds' badge. All 3 variants have been updated with conversion-focused copy. The trust line appears below CTAs on all variants. Footer CTA strip is a new gradient element above the 4-column footer.
